subcodes.title: Words to Aline Shane-Devin spoken on 1907-10-14
subcodes.first_line: The spirit results from the union of body and soul; this spirit becomes immortal, always remaining with the soul and forming for it, after death, a sort of ethereal body. There is a human spirit and a divine spirit
subcodes.subjects: @relationship of the soul to the body, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman]
